ocr.text: In the first trial of 2008, the plant was cabbage, with a date of transplanting on 15 4 2008, using the Bt treatment of Bt kurstaki
on 15 5 2008, and the date of pest release on 27 5 2008, with a quantity per plant of approximately 160 eggs, followed by a date
of virus application on 2 6 2008, with the larval stage being late 1st-instar, a concentration of NPV at 106 OBs/mL, a
concentration of GVPs of 0 or 10 μg/mL, and a date of larval collection on 6 6 2008, with the larval stage being late 2nd.
First trial, 2008  Second trial, 2008  First trial, 2009  Second trial, 2009
Plant  cabbage  cabbage  cabbage  broccoli
Date of transplanting  15 4 2008  23 5 2008  20 4 2009  12 8 2009
Bt treatment  Bt kurstaki 15 5 2008  None  None  Bt kurstaki 3 9 2009
(quantity/plant)  (ca. 160 eggs)  (ca. 320 eggs)  (300–400 eggs)  (300–400 eggs or larvae)
Date of virus application  2 6 2008  7 7 2008  4 6 2009  19 9 2009
(Larval stage)  (late 1st-instar)  (2nd to 3rd-instars)  (2nd-instar)  (2nd-instar)
Concentration of NPV  106 OBs/mL  105 OBs/mL  105 OBs/mL  105 OBs/mL
Concentration of GVPs  0 or 10 μg/mL  0 or 10 μg/mL  5 or 10 μg/mL  5 or 10 μg/mL
Date of larval collection  6 6 2008  11 7 2008  8 6 2009  23 9 2009
(Larval stage)  (late 2nd)  (4th)  (late 2nd to mid-3rd)  (3rd to 4th)
In the second trial of 2008, the plant remained cabbage, with a date of transplanting on 23 5 2008, no Bt treatment was applied,
and the date of pest release was between 29 6–1 7 2008, with a quantity per plant of approximately 320 eggs, followed by a date
of virus application on 7 7 2008, with the larval stage being 2nd to 3rd-instars, a concentration of NPV at 105 OBs/mL, a
concentration of GVPs of 0 or 10 μg/mL, and a date of larval collection on 11 7 2008, with the larval stage being 4th. In the first
trial of 2009, the plant was cabbage, with a date of transplanting on 20 4 2009, no Bt treatment, and the date of pest release on
29–30 5 2009, with a quantity per plant of 300–400 eggs, followed by a date of virus application on 4 6 2009, with the larval
stage being 2nd-instar, a concentration of NPV at 105 OBs/mL, a concentration of GVPs of 5 or 10 μg/mL, and a date of larval
collection on 8 6 2009, with the larval stage being late 2nd to mid-3rd. In the second trial of 2009, the plant was broccoli, with a
date of transplanting on 12 8 2009, utilizing Bt kurstaki on 3 9 2009, and the date of pest release on 11–12 9 2009, with a
quantity per plant of 300–400 eggs or larvae, followed by a date of virus application on 19 9 2009, with the larval stage being
2nd-instar, a concentration of NPV at 105 OBs/mL, a concentration of GVPs of 5 or 10 μg/mL, and a date of larval collection
on 23 9 2009, with the larval stage being 3rd to 4th.
